subcodes.first_line: O servant of Baha! On this auspicious day, when most among the people are deprived and ill-fated, praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء در این یوم پرشگون که اکثری از قوم محروم و مشئوم الحمد لله مرکز
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
